name: Diabetic Gyros
recipeIngredient: 2 lb Ground beef or lamb or both
recipeInstructions:
1. Mix all ingredients except the pita, combining well and kneading until the mixture is stiff.
2. On a skewer, pack meat mixture about 5 inches long and no more than 2 inches in diameter.
3. Put as many "fingers" as possible on a skewer, leaving a 1 inch space between each.
4. Cook over hot coals for 10-15 minutes, turning frequently.
5. Take the pita and slide the gyro into the center.
6. Drizzle with sauce.
7. Fold over to eat.
Sauce:
- Tzatziki: 1 cup yogurt, 1 tbsp mayo, juice of 1 lemon, 2 scallions including green tops (finely chopped), cucumber (minced), and 5 cloves garlic (minced). Mix well.
